description_long: This object is a rectangular, gable-topped carton resembling a classic milk or juice container, primarily colored white with bold red panels and text. The front and back panels prominently display the word 'MALK' in large red letters, with a red and white label below reading 'NOW WITH Vitamin R.' The side panels feature additional text, one with lines suggesting nutritional information and the other with cartoon graphics, including a small character and a portrait. The top of the carton is folded into a spout, with the word 'MALK' printed on the upper face. The overall appearance is playful and satirical, mimicking real-world beverage packaging but with humorous branding. The carton is likely made of coated paperboard, typical for liquid packaging, and is lightweight and easily portable.
description: A white, gable-topped carton with bold red 'MALK' branding and playful graphics, mimicking a milk or juice container.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red 'MALK' label and 'NOW WITH Vitamin R' prominently on a white carton.
description_view_1: Side view displays 'MALK' in red with black lines below, resembling nutritional information.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same 'MALK' and 'NOW WITH Vitamin R' design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features 'MALK', cartoon graphics, and a portrait, adding visual interest.
